name: gov-enterprise-ai-service-platform
description: 政企智能客服平台：Web Chat、移动端 H5、客服工作台、运营后台、可信 RAG 与合规审计骨架。

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/api
